composition_steps.justification: MatMul is exact (Theorem 1, Lemma 1.1); input error = 0
KAN merge: base (exact) + spline (bounded). Add is exact (Lemma 1.4).
Error propagation: Δout_k = Σ_j |W₁[k,j]| · Δin_j (Theorem 1, Lemma 1.1)

Merge propagated error + fresh LUT error at layer 1
Softmax preserves argmax ordering (monotonicity of exp). Classification preserved if min_margin > 2 * max_perturbation.
Argmax(Softmax(x)) = Argmax(x). Classification decision is preserved.
